mapper.select: SELECT o.*, p.status as payment_status FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.id = p.order_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total_amount, status, shipping_address) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{shippingAddress})
INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, product_name, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (order_id, amount, method, transaction_id, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{amount}, #{method}, #{transactionId}, #{status})
